JOIN D & A MACLEOD COMPANY LTD IN OTTAWA

At D. & A. MacLeod Company Ltd, we are committed to providing our clients with a range of personal and corporate solutions for debt problems. Our presence across multiple locations in Eastern Ontario ensures that you can get sound financial assistance for all your debt and bankruptcy planning needs.

​

We are a value-driven team that places tremendous importance on providing our clients with a consistently high level of customer service. Our team consists of qualified and experienced licensed insolvency trustees with vast expertise in performing various bankruptcy and insolvency planning.

​

We strongly believe in investing in the training of our employees. Our employees are our biggest assets. Whether you already have a CAIRP accreditation or you are looking for a rewarding and fulfilling career opportunity, we can provide you with the opportunity to build a truly successful career in the realm of debt management planning.

WHAT ARE WE LOOKING FOR?
